ideal_must_detect.matched_text: has not yet been posted on PSE EDGE

must_detect.matched_text:
Reporting entity: Baybayin Renewables & Finance Corporation (BRFC), a PSE-listed Philippines issuer; location: Taguig service center (non-customer-facing).
Summary: On 02 June, our ESG metrics staging server in a segregated test VPC briefly exposed a dashboard with anonymized training records due to a misapplied bucket policy; system contained only dummy HR and vendor files for a tabletop exercise.
Personal data assessment (Data Privacy Act): no live PII found; sample files used invalid placeholders (e.g., “TIN 000-000-000-0000”, “Acct 1234-XXXX-5678”) and no data subject was identifiable.
Crypto/fintech systems: the BRFC LearnLab crypto-wallet sandbox and API mock (“ChainSim-UAT”) were referenced by the dashboard but held no keys, balances, or customer funds; this was a marketing demo asset.
Information barrier posture: content was in a training subdomain with an “education-only” banner; insider-list and blackout terminology appeared in sample slides explaining SRC and SEC rules for new hires.
Operations impact: no outage to production, no payments, settlements, or ESG/climate reporting feeds to PSE EDGE were affected; our public sustainability microsite remained available.
Regulatory status: NPC notification not triggered under DPA thresholds; evaluation of SEC Philippines Form 17-C materiality completed with “not material” at this time, given the test-only data and public nature of the demo.
Non-public operational consequence (limited): submission of a draft sustainability-linked note investor deck to a prospective underwriter has been def
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

Scenario-based training reference; not agreed commercial terms
Scenario-based training reference; not an actual contract price

uncertain.reason: Indicates anonymization/de-identification but not a clear, live minimisation control per rule scope
Banner suggests informational segregation, but not an explicit barrier control phrase
Regulatory outcome statement may signal disclosure status, but not a defined nonpublic marker keyword
References IP range without containing a specific IP address value
